hero.title: 58 years building medical equipment that institutions trust.
hero.description: Established in 1968 as a sterilization system manufacturer, PEIC now combines Mumbai-based manufacturing with integration support for global and Indian medical technologies.

legacy.label: Our Legacy
legacy.title: Engineering-led from day one.
paragraphs: Precision Electronics Instruments & Components was established in 1968 with a clear mandate: engineer medical sterilization systems that hospitals and institutions could rely on for years of daily operation.

That manufacturing foundation expanded from BIS-certified autoclave production into technical integration for global and Indian medical equipment brands. The distribution business is built on equipment understanding, not catalogue selling.
Today, PEIC gives procurement and biomedical teams clearer ownership across specification, installation, commissioning, documentation, and long-term post-sale support.

research.description: Internal testing and quality validation for sterilization systems, pressure-vessel components, and institutional equipment configurations before dispatch.

manufacturing.description: Manufacturing infrastructure for high-pressure sterilization systems, CSSD equipment, and specialty autoclave lines, with design, fabrication, assembly, and inspection within PEIC's Mumbai facility cluster.
